expectations.evidence: Has a 'Suggested Execution Order' table at the bottom but no task overview table at the top
Tasks have 'Goal' and 'Steps' but no 'Context' section. No background on why each task exists or design decisions affecting it
No per-task dependency section. Dependencies only appear in the execution order table at the end
No spec exists for this eval. No external references to punt context to
Covers system detection (T3), toggle with persistence (T3+T5), component theming (T2+T7), plus extras like transitions and third-party content
Uses Goal/Steps format without overview table, without structured dependency sections, and without the template's section pattern
